ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "argument_types" TEXT /* Types of arguments accepted by the function */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of value returned by the function */,
  "partial_mode" TEXT /* Indicates whether the function supports partial mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the function's behavior and usage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the function was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the function */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the function was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the function */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the function is active or deprecated */,
  "error_handling" TEXT /* Description of error handling mechanisms */,
  "data_validation" TEXT /* Description of data validation rules or checks */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the function has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the function was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the function */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was used */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query used to execute the function */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the function execution */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the function (in seconds) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the function execution was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the execution failed */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset on which the function was executed */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during function execution */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time taken to execute the function */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Sample input data used in the function execution */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Sample output data from the function execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_usage_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the function */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query used to execute the function */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "function_version" INTEGER /* Version of the function at the time of the log entry */,
  "execution_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the execution context */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during function execution */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time taken to execute the function */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Sample input data used in the function execution */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Sample output data from the function execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function that depends on another function */,
  "dependent_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being depended on */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "is_direct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dependency is direct or indirect */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., data, execution) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dependent function */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dependency is optional */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_dependencies_dependent_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_dependencies_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
